codeReview.summary: Reviewed the prior failed feature report plus both commit diffs (multi-select-bulk-ops and fix-bulk-ops-scrutiny). The fix now batches bulk manager moves into a single undoable command, filters invalid manager choices (self + descendants) in the bulk dialog, and adds server-side cycle/self checks in PATCH /employees/:id/move. The added client/server tests cover these fixes and align with the expected behavior.

summary: Pass. The fix adequately addresses both original blocking findings: bulk manager changes are now undoable as a single unit, and cyclic/self-referential manager assignments are blocked via client filtering plus server enforcement.
